parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const escapeQuery = (value) => String(value ?? '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'"); const segmentName = escapeQuery($json.currentSegment || ''); const parentId = String($json.baseFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "name = '" + segmentName + "' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false and '" + parentId + "' in parents"; })() }}

assignments.value: Target folder path was not found from rootFolderId.

parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const escapeQuery = (value) => String(value ?? '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'"); const fileName = escapeQuery($json.targetFileName || ''); const folderId = String($json.targetFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "name = '" + fileName + "' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false and '" + folderId + "' in parents"; })() }}

assignments.name: errorMessage
assignments.value: No file found with the given name in target folder.

parameters.queryString: ={{ (() => { const customQuery = String($json.listQuery || '').trim(); if (customQuery) return customQuery; const folderId = String($json.targetFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "'" + folderId + "' in parents and trashed = false"; })() }}

={{ (() => { const escapeQuery = (value) => String(value ?? '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/'/g, "\\'"); const fileName = escapeQuery($json.targetFileName || ''); const folderId = String($json.targetFolderId || 'root').trim() || 'root'; return "name = '" + fileName + "' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.document' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.presentation' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.drawing' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.form' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.script' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.site' and mimeType != 'application/vnd.google-apps.shortcut' and trashed = false and '" + folderId + "' in parents"; })() }}

assignments.name: errorMessage
assignments.value: Missing binary file input. Please pass a binary file field (for example: file) or set binaryFieldName.

parameters.content:
## INPUT CONTRACT (Execute Workflow Trigger)

`action` (string): `upsert|get|delete|list` (default `upsert`)
`rootFolderId` (string): start folder ID (default `root`)
`folderPath` (string): nested path under root, ex: `books/2026/april`
- Set `folderPath` to empty string (``) to work directly in `rootFolderId`
`fileName` (string): file name for `upsert/get/delete`
`binaryFieldName` (string): binary key to upload/update (default first key in `$binary`)
`listLimit` (number): max list items when `listReturnAll=false` (default `200`)
`listReturnAll` (boolean): list all or use limit (default `true`)
`listQuery` (string, optional): custom Google Drive query for list action
`selfWorkflowPath` (string): workflow path used for recursive folder traversal

### Result shape
Common keys: `status`, `action`, folder context (`folderId`, `folderUrl`)
Success branches also return file/list details (`fileId`, `fileUrl`, `items`, etc.).

## STAGE 1: RESOLVE TARGET FOLDER

Nodes:
- Normalize Request
- If Has Segment
- Search Current Folder / Create Missing Folder
- Execute Recursive Workflow
- Finalize Target Context

Goal: convert `rootFolderId + folderPath` into stable folder context (`folderId`, `folderUrl`) before action routing.

Note: no direct folder-id override input. If you already have exact folder ID, pass it via `rootFolderId` and set `folderPath` to empty string.

Stage safety:
- `Merge Created Folder Context` only receives data from the active create branch to avoid empty terminal outputs.

## STAGE 2: ACTION ROUTER

Node: `Switch Action`

Routes:
- `get`
- `delete`
- `list`
- fallback => `upsert`

All branches consume the same resolved target context from Stage 1.

## BRANCH: GET / DELETE

Flow:
- Search Existing File (Get/Delete)
- If File Exists (Get/Delete)
- If Delete Action
- Delete Existing File OR Build Get File Result
- Build Delete Result / Build File Not Found Result

Purpose: non-upload read/delete operations with explicit not-found handling.

Folder safety:
- File existence checks ignore folder mimeType to prevent accidental folder delete/get.

## BRANCH: LIST

Flow:
- Search Folder Items (List)
- Build List Result

Supports:
- default query by resolved `folderId`
- optional custom `listQuery`
- pagination behavior via `listReturnAll` + `listLimit`.

## BRANCH: UPSERT (UPLOAD/UPDATE)

Flow:
- If Has File Binary
- Search Existing File
- If File Exists
- Update Existing File OR Upload New File
- Build Updated Result / Build Created Result
- Build Missing File Result

Purpose: idempotent file write path with clear outcomes (`updated` vs `created`).

Branch safety:
- Merge context nodes are fed from active `If` branches only, so inactive paths do not emit empty terminal outputs.
- ID precedence: file-search/update/upload outputs override folder-context IDs in merge nodes.
